F1® Manager 2024.desc: Lead your team to glory in F1® Manager 2024. A new Formula 1® season has arrived, and with it, the most comprehensive F1® management experience to date. Build a legacy with one of 10 official F1® constructors or create your own team for the very first time.

min_req.cpu: Intel Core i5-4590 or AMD FX-8370
min_req.gpu: (3GB VRAM) Nvidia GeForce GTX 960, AMD R9 280x or Intel Arc 750

rec_req.cpu: Intel Core i7-7700 or AMD Ryzen 7 2700
rec_req.gpu: (4GB VRAM) GeForce GTX 1080, Radeon RX 580 or Intel Arc 770
